---
description: Debug a failing test
---

# Debug Failing Test

A test is failing. Help me understand why and fix it.

## Context
- Test file: {{testFile}}
- Test name: {{testName}}
- Error message: {{errorMessage}}

## Instructions
1. Read the failing test to understand what it's testing
2. Read the implementation code being tested
3. Identify the mismatch between expected and actual behavior
4. Suggest a fix (either to the test or the implementation)
5. Explain why the fix is correct
